concept.pre:
Total fuel/tank: 21.5 Gallons
Usable fuel: 40 Gallons
Oil: 4-8 quarts
VNe (Maximum air speed in any condition): 158
VNo (Maximum air speed in rough air): 127
VFe (Maximum air speed with flaps): 85
Va (maneuvering speed): 82-99
VS (Stall speed without flaps): 44
VSo (Stall speed with flaps): 33
Vx (Best angle): 56
Vy (Best rate): 70
Engine at 2700RPM: 160HP
Engine failure after takeoff: 60 Kias
Maneuvering speed (1670 lbs): 104 Kias
Maneuvering speed (1500 lbs): 98 Kias
Maneuvering speed (1350 lbs): 93 Kias
Maximum glide: 60 Kias
Precautionary landing with engine power: 55 Kias
Landing without engine power and flaps up: 65 Kias
Landing without engine power and flaps down: 60 Kias
What is the emergency airspeed for engine failure after takeoff?
60 Kias 55 Kias 65 Kias 95 Kias What is the emergency maneuvering air speed when loaded to 1670 gross weight?
104 Kias 98 Kias 93 Kias 125 Kias What is the emergency maneuvering air speed when loaded to 1500 gross weight?
98 Kias 104 Kias 93 Kias 125 Kias What is the emergency maneuvering air speed when loaded to 1350 gross weight?
93 Kias 104 Kias 98 Kias 125 Kias What is the air speed for the longest glide path?
60 Kias 55 Kias 65 Kias 70 Kias What air speed should be used for a precautionary landing with engine power?
55 Kias 60 Kias 65 Kias 70 Kias What air speed should be used for landing without engine power and flaps up?
65 Kias 60 Kias 55 Kias 70 Kias What air speed should be used for landing without engine power and flaps down?
60 Kias 65 Kias 55 Kias 70 Kias What is the total usable fuel in a tank?
21.5 Gal 30 Gal 20.5 Gal 20.5 Gal What is the oil range for a Skyhawk?
4-8 6-8 4-6 8-12 What is VNe?
Maximum speed in any conditions, 158 KIAS Maximum speed in any conditions, 150 KIAS Maximum speed in smooth air, 127 KIAS Maximum speed in smooth air, 158 KIAS What is VNo?
Maximum speed in smooth air, 127 KIAS Maximum speed in any conditions, 158 KIAS Maximum speed in any conditions, 150 KIAS Maximum speed in smooth air, 158 KIAS What is VFe?
Maximum speed with flaps extended, 85 KIAS Maximum speed in smooth air, 127 KIAS Stall speed with flaps extended, 33 KIAS What is VA?
Manuevering speed, 88-99 KIAS (Heavier means faster) Maximum speed in smooth air, 127 KIAS Maximum speed with flaps extended, 85 KIAS What is VS?
Stall speed without flaps, 44 KIAS Stall speed, 33 KIAS Never exceed speed, 158 KIAS What is VSo?
Stall speed with flaps, 33 KIAS Stall speed without flaps, 44 KIAS Never exceed speed, 127 KIAS What is Vx?
Best angle of climb, 56 KIAS Best rate of climb, 70 KIAS Best angle of climb, 70 KIAS Best rate of climb, 56 KIAS What is Vy?
Best rate of climb, 70 KIAS Best angle of climb, 56 KIAS Best angle of climb, 70 KIAS Best rate of climb, 56 KIAS
